  \caption[Speed of sound in air per run, measured by the probe hardware (132 runs)]{
    Speed of sound in air per run, measured by the probe hardware (132 runs). Right axis: approximate air temperature from $c_{\mathrm{air}}\approx 331 + 0.606\,T$. Dashed line: 343.0\,m/s reference ($\approx$20\,\textdegree C). Worst-case amplitude scale error: 0.241\,\% (0.0241\,mm on a 10\,mm wave). For OUT/IN ratios the error cancels exactly.
  }
  \label{fig:ch04_sound_speed}
\end{figure}
